name: list_objects
description: List all objects within an R2 bucket using the S3-compatible ListObjectsV2 endpoint. Supports prefix filtering for navigating virtual folder hierarchies and pagination with continuation tokens.

parameters.name: bucket_name
parameters.description: The name of the R2 bucket to list objects from.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: Only return objects whose keys start with this prefix (e.g., 'images/' to list a virtual folder).

parameters.name: delimiter
parameters.description: Character to use for grouping keys into common prefixes (virtual folders). Usually '/'.

parameters.name: max-keys
parameters.description: Maximum number of keys to return (default: 1000, max: 1000).

parameters.name: continuation-token
parameters.description: Token from a previous response to retrieve the next page of results.

body._note: Response is XML (S3-compatible). Shown here as JSON equivalent for readability.
